assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with the table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) but no data rows, or explicitly notes that no repositories are configured
assertion_results.evidence: The file contains the ## Repository Registry section with correct table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path), but it includes a data row: '| my-project | Web application | — | ./ |' (line 24). The assertion requires either no data rows OR an explicit note that no repositories are configured. Neither condition is met — there is a populated data row and no such note.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 28-30 of claude-md-result.md contain: '- Project key: MYPROJ', '- Cloud ID: abc123', '- Feature issue type ID: 10001' under the '## Jira Configuration' heading at line 27.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: Line 34 of claude-md-result.md reads: 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.' and line 38 reads: 'No limitations known — no Serena instances configured.' under the '## Code Intelligence' heading at line 33.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 18: '**No Serena instances discovered**'. Additionally, the Tool Availability Summary table at line 71 shows 'Serena MCP | No | (none)'. Step 2 documents the search for Serena tool patterns and confirms none were found.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 28-29: 'Checked for Atlassian MCP server among available tools (tools prefixed with mcp__atlassian__)' and '**No Atlassian MCP tools found** in the tool listing'. Lines 38: 'User chose: Option 2 (manual entry)'. Lines 42-49 document the manual entry of Jira fields. Tool Availability Summary shows 'Atlassian MCP | No | (none)'.

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 19: 'Prompted user: "No Serena MCP servers were found. Would you like to continue without code intelligence or set up Serena first?"' Line 20: 'User chose: Continue without code intelligence'.
